title: BALD on Base - REKT
relevance_summary: Rug pull on a memecoin with no established bridging UI, leading to a massive loss of funds.
red_flags: Direct ETH deposits into a contract without a bridging UI
Rapid liquidity addition and subsequent price manipulation
summary: Users deposited ETH into a memecoin named BALD on Base without a bridging UI, leading to a rug pull that resulted in a loss of $23M.
